div.h1: Neural Engine: Value Object Memory Layout
div.p: Object Type: micrograd.engine.Value Total Size: ~350-400 bytes (Heap Allocated) Page Alignment: 8-byte aligned

ul.li: PyObject_HEAD: Standard 16-byte header for CPython objects on 64-bit systems.
Pointer Overhead: Each attribute in __slots__ or __dict__ is an 8-byte pointer to a heap-allocated object.
Memory Impact: Because Value instances are created for every operation in a neural network, total memory scales linearly with the number of nodes in the computational graph.
Alignment: CPython allocator uses 8-byte alignment for all object allocations.
